ns0:entry.ns0:title: AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardHome
Language: go
Network-wide ads & trackers blocking DNS server

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GopeedLab/gopeed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GopeedLab/gopeed
Language: go
A fast, modern download manager for HTTP, BitTorrent, Magnet, and ed2k. Cross-platform, built with Golang and Flutter.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XIU2/CloudflareSpeedTest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XIU2/CloudflareSpeedTest
Language: go
🌩「自选优选 IP」测试 Cloudflare CDN 延迟和速度，获取最快 IP ！当然也支持其他 CDN / 多个解析 IP 的网站 ~

ns0:entry.ns0:title: casdoor/casdoor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/casdoor/casdoor
Language: go
An open-source Agent-first Identity and Access Management (IAM) /LLM MCP & agent gateway and auth server with web UI supporting OpenClaw, MCP, OAuth, OIDC, SAML, CAS, LDAP, SCIM, WebAuthn, TOTP, MFA, Face ID, Google Workspace, Azure AD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cirruslabs/orchard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cirruslabs/orchard
Language: go
Orchestrator for running Tart Virtual Machines on a cluster of Apple Silicon devices

ns0:entry.ns0:title: evcc-io/evcc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/evcc-io/evcc
Language: go
solar charging ☀️🚘

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fish2018/pansou
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fish2018/pansou
Language: go
PanSou是一款高性能的网盘资源搜索API服务，支持TG频道和插件搜索。系统设计以性能和可扩展性为核心，支持多频道多插件并发搜索、结果智能排序和网盘类型分类。docker集成前后端，一键启动，开箱即用。 https://so.252035.xyz/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gdy666/lucky
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gdy666/lucky
Language: go
软硬路由公网神器,ipv6/ipv4 端口转发,反向代理,DDNS,WOL,ipv4 stun内网穿透,cron,acme,rclone,ftp,webdav,filebrowser

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gosom/google-maps-scraper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gosom/google-maps-scraper
Language: go
scrape data from Google Maps. Extracts data such as the name, address, phone number, website URL, rating, reviews number, latitude and longitude, reviews,email and more for each place

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/loki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/loki
Language: go
Like Prometheus, but for logs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: harness/harness
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/harness/harness
Language: go
Harness Open Source is an end-to-end developer platform with Source Control Management, CI/CD Pipelines, Hosted Developer Environments, and Artifact Registries.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mostlygeek/llama-swap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mostlygeek/llama-swap
Language: go
Reliable model swapping for any local OpenAI/Anthropic compatible server - llama.cpp, vllm, etc

ns0:entry.ns0:title: steipete/wacli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/steipete/wacli
Language: go
WhatsApp CLI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sysadminsmedia/homebox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sysadminsmedia/homebox
Language: go
A continuation of HomeBox the inventory and organization system built for the Home User

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tailscale/tailscale
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tailscale/tailscale
Language: go
The easiest, most secure way to use WireGuard and 2FA.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tinygo-org/tinygo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tinygo-org/tinygo
Language: go
Go compiler for small places. Microcontrollers, WebAssembly (WASM/WASI), and command-line tools. Based on LLVM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: usememos/memos
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/usememos/memos
Language: go
Open-source, self-hosted note-taking tool built for quick capture. Markdown-native, lightweight, and fully yours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: v2fly/domain-list-community
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/v2fly/domain-list-community
Language: go
Community managed domain list. Generate geosite.dat for V2Ray.
